programmes.show_description: The new and exclusive Print & Pattern Tool, created with Catherine Pooler, makes pattern play simple and fun! This dual tool makes creating repeat patterns easier than ever.
It's time for a brand-new designer launch! Tune in for fabulous demos and amazing deals. Get ready for a crafty hour packed with new stamps, dies, stencils, washi tape, and more.

programmes.show_description: ...Sew Launch: The fantastic Tilly Walnes joins us to launch her brand new book - Tilly and the Buttons: Learn to Sew.

Discover fabrics designed to make quilting easier, from extra-wide backings that give you seamless coverage for large quilts to perfectly coordinated pre-cut bundles.
Unlock endless creative possibilities with this innovative electronic cutting machine. With its unique built-in scanner.
